result.reason: The application fails to restore previously opened connections after a restart because the persistence string for ConnectionWindow was not reliably capturing all open connection IDs during shutdown.
result.approach: Modified ConnectionWindow.GetPersistString() to use connDock.Documents instead of connDock.Contents to reliably capture the ConstantIDs of all open connection tabs for persistence.
